film.title: Anupama
film.overview: A grieving widower has a complex relationship with his daughter, blaming her for his wife's death. As she grows up, a kind poet helps her heal and find happiness despite her father's conflicted behavior.

dialogues.dialogue: Do not torment me like this...he shall arrive soon I'm ready To eat? - Hush! Shameless! Listen...what if we don't go? What are you saying! If we don't go, we'll earn a bad name.
dialogues.cause_raw: suggesting not to attend a social event

dialogues.dialogue: I know now for sure that you haven't recognised me. I am Aruna's friend, Shanta. - Oh yes! Shanta. Tell me, what are you so proud of? Everyone gets married.  And everyone becomes a father too. You are badly mistaken.
And everyone becomes a father too. You are badly mistaken. Neither have I become proud, nor am I going to be a father. Trying to hide? - Not at all. You are shooting in the dark.
No. - Damn you! You have truly disappointed me. - Why? I thought you will come back and make me proud. But you didn't do a thing! Come inside.

Yes, you'd see what a good sense of humor she has. I can't be serious like you every time. Ma, they are so rich, but not at all proud. They are very nice people. Gauri, never form an opinion about someone so soon.
I disgrace myself today My heart skips a beat If I begin to feel proud Why did you give me I feel flushed seeing my glowing face
